title: The Deep Dark Void
description: Adding New Features To The End
body:
Welcome to the Deep Dark Void Mod, it adds new features to the end such as mobs, blocks and items with a dimension planned in the future

Features

Mobs:

Paramedo,Big end lizard that spawns on the outer islands and attacks the player, making the player go up into the air

Paramedy,the small brother of the Paramedo, does not attack and escapes from the player

End Hunger,Mob C from the 2017 mob vote reimagined, drops a hunger tooth which will have uses in the future

Tools: 

Paratone toolset,Slightly better than Netherite currently but it will change in the future to make it more balanced for gameplay

Blocks:

Paratone Ore, Spawns in the end islands

Paratone block,Block of paratone

(There's a current but with mob spawning, this issue will be solved in the next update).

Other links:

Discord: https://discord.gg/JtN9Bugdc6

Curseforge Link: 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deep-void-mod
